commit.message:
Add position monitor, auto-exit, and sell functionality

Position Monitor:
- /position-monitor endpoint: shows all positions with current
  market prices, entry price, unrealized P&L (cents + %)
- Dashboard positions table now shows Entry, Current, P&L columns
- SELL button on each position for instant exit

Auto-Exit System:
- Take profit at +20% (sell when position is up 20%+)
- Stop loss at -15% (cut losses when position is down 15%+)
- Runs every 30s in background loop when auto-trade is ON
- Logs all auto-exits

Sell API:
- /sell-position endpoint: sell existing positions
- Uses action="sell" per Kalshi API v2
- Records all sells in trade history

Settlement filter loosened to 180 days since we can now exit
early via sell — dont need to wait for settlement to compound.

commit.message:
Hard 90-day max on ALL picks — compounding requires fast turns

Every pick (hero, sports, non-sports, misc) must settle within
90 days. No more 9-month or multi-year bets tying up capital.

$73 → $1M requires aggressive compounding. A $5 bet that
returns $6 in 3 days can be reinvested immediately. The same
bet locked up for 9 months is dead money.

commit.message:
Filter out bad risk/reward from hero picks

Skip picks where:
- Price > 90¢ (paying 90¢ to win $1 = tiny profit, huge loss)
- Price < 5¢ (longshots with no real edge)

The Tom Kim PGA pick was 98¢ cost for 2¢ profit — terrible
risk/reward that should never be in the hero section.

commit.message:
fix(functions): move dot-source into script body to fix scope issue

Functions defined inside a PowerShell helper function (via dot-source)
are scoped to that function and vanish when it returns. Move the load
loop into the script body so all functions land in the caller's scope.

commit.message:
feat: RecaptureDetector v1.12, AF/AE convergence wait e coleta de dataset

## RecaptureDetector v1.9 → v1.12
- v1.9: fix bottleneck detectEmissiveSurface (Long arithmetic + strideEmissive)
- v1.10: tabelas DFT pré-calculadas (4611ms → 213ms → ~60ms)
- v1.11: center crop 128×128 stride=1; remove specular do combined; pesos Moiré 0.5 / Chromatic 0.2
- v1.12: corrige bloqueio matematicamente impossível sem cromático (Moiré 0.55→0.70,
  Chromatic 0.35→0.20); alarga banda DFT 2-15 → 2-70 para cobrir fill de tela 40-90%

## SecureCameraCapture — aguardo de convergência AF/AE
- Camera2Interop CaptureCallback rastreia CONTROL_AF_STATE / CONTROL_AE_STATE
- Adiciona INACTIVE e PASSIVE_UNFOCUSED como estados convergidos (Samsung A16 inicia em INACTIVE)
- settleTimeoutMs calibrado em 1500ms (sessão Camera2 no A16 abre em ~1050ms)
- camera_settle_ms registrado em pipelineTimingsMs
- ResolutionSelector.HIGHEST_AVAILABLE_STRATEGY corrige resolução 640×480 default

## ProvviCapture
- bypassRecaptureBlock: Boolean = false — permite coleta de dataset de recapturas intencionais
- camera_settle_ms incluído em timings e allAssertions

## Demo app — DatasetCollectionScreen
- Preview ao vivo via Flutter camera + hand-off para SDK YUV (250ms delay)
- Sidecar .scores.json salvo junto ao JPEG com scores SDK pré-codec (preserva sinal UV)
- Fix preview distortion (FittedBox + SizedBox expand/cover)

## Diagnostic tool
- Suporte a sidecar: lê .scores.json via ContentResolver antes de reanalisar JPEG
- Coluna source no CSV (sdk_yuv vs reanalysis_jpeg)
- Fix separador decimal locale-dependente no CSV

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Simplify installation to a 3-command quick path

- Add CDN fallback (jsDelivr 0.4.x) in hook_library_info_build() so
  the toolbar JS loads without local library installation; downgrade the
  runtime JS check from REQUIREMENT_ERROR to REQUIREMENT_WARNING
- _instruckt_drupal_iife_available() always returns TRUE now that the
  toolbar library is always registered (local or CDN)
- Downgrade install-phase private stream check from REQUIREMENT_ERROR to
  REQUIREMENT_WARNING so drush en succeeds without file_private_path set
- Guard hook_install() directory creation behind isValidScheme('private')
  to avoid InvalidStreamWrapperException when private:// isn't configured
- Add step 0 to drush instruckt:setup: creates ../private directory,
  appends file_private_path to settings.php, and creates _instruckt/
  storage dirs — all idempotent; inject FileSystemInterface and
  StreamWrapperManagerInterface for this work
- Fix @option docblock trailing periods being parsed by Drush as default
  option values (removed "Default: X." from annotation descriptions)
- Fix instruckt_drupal.info.yml configure: key pointing to nonexistent
  route instruckt_drupal.settings → instruckt_drupal.admin_settings
- Update RequirementsTest to expect REQUIREMENT_WARNING for missing IIFE
- Rewrite README Installation section: 3-step quick path, optional local
  JS section, collapsed details block for manual MCP auth alternative;
  remove private filesystem and composer.json as hard prerequisites

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: Run login API on Edge runtime to match middleware token generation

The login was failing because the login API (Node.js runtime) and the
middleware (Edge runtime) were computing different HMAC-SHA256 signatures
from the same secret. The cookie set by login was always rejected by
middleware. Fixed by running the login route on Edge runtime so both
use the same crypto implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(functions): hardcode deploy path instead of relying on PSScriptRoot

$PSScriptRoot and $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path are unreliable when
dot-sourced from an interactive session. The dotfiles always deploy to
$HOME\.dotfiles, so the functions directory path is always known.

commit.message:
fix(setup): reliably rename init branch to main regardless of git default

git init may create 'master' or 'main' depending on system config.
Detect the actual branch name and only rename if it differs from 'main'
rather than silently suppressing the error with 2>$null.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rebuild Loachy as v4: real de-vigged edge detection + all bug fixes

Core strategy fix:
- Replace fake edge formula (avg vig prob vs best prob = meaningless) with
  additive de-vig: normalize avg implied probs per market to get true probability,
  then edge = true_prob - to_prob(best_price). This is real positive-EV detection.
- Require min 2% edge AND min 3 books confirming price (was 1% + 1 book)
- Kelly bet sizing now uses live wallet.cash not fixed paper_budget
- Remove zero-edge fallback candidates entirely (AI only sees real edges)

Bug fixes:
- Overnight skip: 2-6 UTC (was 0-8, cut NFL/NBA primetime windows)
- auto_bet_confidence: 0.72 (was 0.65)
- pending_expiry: 90 min OR game_start-30min, whichever sooner (was 30 min < scan interval)
- MAX_LIVE_CALLS: 4 (was 1, 8/9 sports used stale cache every scan)
- Weather: real team city coordinates + INDOOR_TEAMS skip (was Kansas for every game)
- Score settlement: 30-min cache per sport (saves Odds API credits)
- Streak reduce factor: 0.70 (was 0.50)
- AI model: claude-haiku (cheaper/faster)
- AI prompt: veto-oriented with true_prob%, edge%, book count context
- Parlay edge: uses de-vigged true_prob (was vig-inflated consensus)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(functions): use MyInvocation path instead of PSScriptRoot in main.ps1

$PSScriptRoot is empty when a script is dot-sourced from a profile,
causing $_FunctionsDir to be empty and all function files to silently
skip loading. $MyInvocation.MyCommand.Path is always set correctly
when dot-sourcing a .ps1 file.

commit.message:
feat(testing): local test infrastructure, profiling, strictness — 2,430 tests, 0 failures

Testing infrastructure:
- scripts/test-all.sh: 3-tier local test runner (fast/full/heavy) replacing CI
- scripts/smoke-test.sh: quick health check for Docker stack
- scripts/profile.sh: master profiling script (pyinstrument, memray, radon, twiggy)
- Deleted pytest.ini (was overriding pyproject.toml), moved config to pyproject.toml
- Excluded test_schema_fuzzing.py from main suite (poisons settings cache)

Profiling & optimization:
- pyinstrument, memray, radon added to dev deps
- rollup-plugin-visualizer for bundle treemap (ANALYZE=1 npx vite build)
- SQLAlchemy slow query profiler middleware (SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS env var)
- twiggy + cargo-bloat for WASM size analysis

Config strictness:
- basedpyright include fixed: sleep_scoring_app → sleep_scoring_web
- ruff: re-enabled C901/PLR0912/PLR0915 with per-file ignores for existing outliers
- ESLint: added complexity, max-depth, no-explicit-any, no-console, prefer-const
- Lighthouse: promoted accessibility/FCP/LCP/TBT from warn → error
- pytest: added --strict-config, filterwarnings for DeprecationWarning
- Pre-commit: fixed basedpyright (was || true), added gitleaks, eslint, clippy

CI slimmed:
- Removed 20 GitHub Actions jobs, kept only Chromatic (visual regression on push)
- Deleted ci.yml (duplicate)
- Everything runs locally via scripts/test-all.sh

Bug fixes:
- test_postgres_specific: minute overflow (0-99 → h:m), greenlet after rollback
- test_api_consensus: SQLite race condition in concurrent votes
- test_markers_autoscore: stale state assertion
- test_benchmarks: CSV loader skip_rows=0 for headerless test data
- Zod schemas: derived from OpenAPI constants (no drift), removed 12 dead schemas
- API validation: console.warn → console.error for schema mismatches
- test-all.sh: ((VAR++)) crash under set -e, SITE_PASSWORD leak in ps

Frontend:
- Zod wired: LoginFormSchema + zodResolver, API response validation
- Container structure tests for backend + frontend Docker images
- Property-based tests: 77 Hypothesis tests (marker placement, complexity, metrics, export)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: Web application for actigraphy sleep scoring

commit.message:
Use BeebASM features for cleaner, more readable source

- FOR/NEXT: unrolled 32-byte block copy loop (32 identical lines
  → 3-line FOR loop). Still assembles to identical bytes.
- FOR/NEXT: tile_src_lo generated with (n MOD 4) * &40 expression
  instead of 16 hand-written EQUB lines
- FOR/NEXT: tile_src_hi generated with tile_src_base + (n DIV 4)
  instead of 16 hand-written EQUB lines
- SKIP: padding blocks use SKIP N instead of rows of EQUB &00

Still byte-exact: 0 mismatches.

- KH-104: Clear GND-resolved power rails, KH-090: fixed-output LDOs never inverting
- KH-101: Parser bounds check for truncated files, KH-102: list-typed PCB value fields

commit.message:
Fix ffmpeg detection and OTA flash reliability (#77)

* Fix ffmpeg detection in Electron on macOS

Electron apps launched from Finder don't inherit the shell PATH, so
`which ffmpeg` fails even when ffmpeg is installed via Homebrew. Replace
with direct `ffmpeg -version` execution, falling back to absolute
Homebrew paths (/opt/homebrew/bin, /usr/local/bin).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix OTA firmware update reliability for parallel multi-driver flashing

ESP32: Add 10ms yield after each flash write to let WiFi/LWIP stack
recover from SPI bus stalls that block MQTT progress messages. Poll
mqttClient.loop() during pre-reboot delay to complete QoS 2 result
handshake before restart.

Hub: Track HTTP download completion server-side as a fallback success
signal. If the hub fully served the firmware file but never received
the MQTT result (device rebooted before completing QoS 2 handshake),
treat as success on timeout instead of falsely reporting failure.
HTTP download start also clears the first-contact timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

feat: view type picker, theme picker, project detail screens, fullscreen live route

- Replace Step 2 broad Narrative/Interactive cards with granular view type picker
  (Document Views: Funder Report, Board Deck, Grant Narrative;
   Interactive Views: Impact Command Center, Impact Journey, Staff Dashboard, Orbit View)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace APScheduler with simple background thread

APScheduler's threadpool executor was not firing jobs
under gunicorn regardless of preload/worker config.

Replaced with a simple daemon thread that:
- Runs run_bot_scan() every 15 seconds
- Warms picks cache every ~60 seconds (every 4th scan)
- Has full error logging with tracebacks
- Starts 8 seconds after boot to let server initialize

This is more reliable — no dependency on APScheduler's
internal thread management working with gunicorn.
